title: Not Just Sandwich
description: An opportunity to save space by combining almost any food with a piece of bread without losing its nutritional value.
body:
Not Just Sandwich
-
New food in Minecraft

 A new tool/weapon will be available at your disposal - a knife.
A knife is an analogue of a sword, which is twice as weak and twice as fast. Available from the very beginning of the game both from wood and cobblestone and so on.

 Sandwich is a new type of food provided by this mod. Obtained by combining bread (pre-cut with the knife mentioned above), and any edible material. It's advantage is that it does not lose its nutritional value, while maintaining inventory space. It is also possible to make sandwiches from previously inaccessible ingregients such as pufferfish and clownfish, but in addition to this, new ingredients are added based on new items (for example, glow berries).

This mod was made with the help of Mcreator due to lack of time and skill to learn java code.
With the release of updates, new versions of the mod will be developed.
